scripts.release:gates: pnpm --filter @decisioning/api prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @decisioning/api build && pnpm --filter @decisioning/api test && pnpm --filter @decisioning/api smoke:inapp
scripts.docker:build: DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker buildx build -f docker/api.Dockerfile -t decisioning-api:local . --load && DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker buildx build -f docker/ui.Dockerfile -t decisioning-ui:local . --load
